gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT (navi22, LLVM 15.0.7, DRM 3.52, 6.4.10-273-tkg-pds)
title: The Alters

notes:
You can run it in a windowed mode, and it is kind of playable with a gamepad, but the moment you move your mouse or press any key it dies. Also textures colors are wrong.

I've tried to address this in my Steam review and asked devs to confirm if this WILL NOT be worked on to fix, and got this in response from the developer:
```
Hello sTiKyt,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We're sorry to hear you've encountered technical issues with our game.

I confirm that, while it's supported on Steam Deck, the game is not and will not be supported on Linux OS.

The system requirements are always available both on the Steam Store and on our FAQ site.

Wishing you well!
Agata, 11 bit studios
```

Basically, some community manager is simply telling us it won't be fixed and they don't care. I'm refunding the game.
title: The Alters
